created_for: V577 — Montgomery Registry & Package Manifest Package
notes: V590 promotes Montgomery from disabled staged to operational while preserving county identity, GEOID, containment metadata, rollback references, and protected boundaries.

production_asset_path_decision.rationale: Use the accepted Montgomery package path directly for activation to avoid duplicating county assets into data/ and to keep rollback limited to registry/gate reversal.
production_asset_path_decision.rollback_impact: Rollback only restores activation booleans and leaves inert package assets in place.
production_asset_path_decision.future_county_implication: Future counties can activate from package-scoped accepted assets once validation proves runtime loading and containment.
